pr-evidence/databricks-vllm-provider-pre.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5/high reviewer Hegel initially found that the preset allowed debug fallback flags and post-Cachet extra wheels; both were patched with regression tests, and the delta review approved with no findings.

python -m pytest -q tests/test_benchmark_plan.py tests/test_databricks_job.py tests/test_template_resources.py -> 163 passed
installed-wheel preset smoke generated a g6.8xlarge provider-backed vLLM payload and rejected --extra-wheel-uri -> passed
GitHub CI Test and build for PR #305 -> success
what_changed: Added --provider-backed-vllm-native-probe as a single-target Databricks engine-probe preset for Cachet's built-in provider-backed vLLM path.
The preset fills the Cachet vLLM probe factory, vLLM native delegate, provider-backed connector metadata, expected backend, and the centralized vllm==0.23.0 runtime package.
The preset rejects conflicting factory/backend/metadata/runtime values plus debug fallback flags and extra wheels so adapter modules come from the Cachet wheel.
pr-evidence/databricks-vllm-provider-pre.why: The next g6.8xlarge probe should be launched from a fail-closed, copy-paste-safe command instead of hand-assembling many native connector flags.
